content.text:
[Mon 2026-04-20 00:55 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: You are a senior frontend developer agent. Your task is to IMPLEMENT a new dashboard design for a CMS Driving Training (CMS Đào tạo lái xe) application.

## Workspace
Project root: `/root/.openclaw/workspaces/ahv-driving-training-system/ahv-dtlx-frontend/`
Current branch: `feat/cms-driving-training-design` (ALREADY checked out, DO NOT change branch)
Tech stack: React + Vite + Ant Design + Redux + React Router v6

## Design Reference (from screenshot analysis)
The new dashboard should have this layout:

### Header (top bar)
- Logo area on left: "Đào tạo lái xe" text or image
- Right side: notification bell icon, user avatar "NV" with dropdown
- Background: white with subtle bottom border

### Sidebar (left nav)
- Logo at top: circular "D" icon or "ĐTLX" text
- Navigation items with icons:
  - 🏠 Trang chủ (Dashboard)
  - 👨‍🎓 Quản lý Học viên
  - 📅 Quản lý Lịch học / Lịch thi
  - 🔔 Thông báo
  - 💰 Phí & Thanh toán
  - 📊 Báo cáo
  - ⚙️ Cài đặt
  - 🔒 Đăng xuất
- Active state: highlighted background (purple/violet accent)
- Sidebar background: white or light gray

### Main Content Area
**Section 1: Stats Row**
- 2 large stat cards side by side:
  - "Giáo viên" card: icon (👨‍🏫 or teacher icon), value "2.000.000 ₫", subtitle "Tổng doanh thu"
  - "Học viên" card: icon (👨‍🎓 or student icon), value "2.000.000 ₫", subtitle "Tổng doanh thu"
- Card style: white background, subtle shadow, rounded corners, large number in bold

**Section 2: Calendar/Schedule Section**
- Section title: "Lịch học / Lịch thi" with a "+" add button
- View toggle: Grid icon / List icon (top right of section)
- Grid view: 3-column grid of schedule cards (max 6 visible, rest scrollable OR pagination)
  - Each card: Date badge (red/blue), Course name (3 lines max with ...), Time slot, Status badge
  - "Xem thêm" or scroll to show more
- List view: table format with columns: Ngày, Ca học, Khoá học, Trạng thái

**Section 3: Cost Management Table (Chi phí)**
- Section title: "Thông kê chi phí"
- Horizontal scrollable table:
  - Columns: Ngày (date), Loại chi phí (type), Số tiền (amount), Ghi chú (notes)
  - Alternating row colors
  - Horizontal scroll bar at bottom of table

**Section 4: Driver Info (Thông tin tài xế)**
- Cards showing driver information: Name, license type, contact info

### Color Scheme
- Primary accent: purple/violet (#8B5CF6 or similar)
- White backgrounds for cards
- Light gray for page background
- Red/Orange for important stats

## Implementation Steps

1. First, READ and understand the existing:
   - `src/layouts/AdminLayout.jsx` - main layout
   - `src/components/SideNav.jsx` - sidebar component  
   - `src/pages/dashboard/chart/index.jsx` - current dashboard chart area
   - `src/pages/dashboard/chart/card/ListCard.jsx` - current stat cards

2. Create the new dashboard page. The new dashboard should REPLACE the existing ChartsDashboard component content (keep the date/agent filters and ListCard from current dashboard but redesign them).

3. Key components to create:
   - `src/pages/dashboard/components/StatsRow.jsx` - The 2 stat cards row (Giáo viên + Học viên)
   - `src/pages/dashboard/components/CalendarSection.jsx` - Calendar grid with view toggle
   - `src/pages/dashboard/components/CostTable.jsx` - Chi phí scrollable table
   - `src/pages/dashboard/components/DriverInfo.jsx` - Driver info cards
   - `src/pages/dashboard/components/NewSideNav.jsx` - NEW sidebar matching the design
   - `src/pages/dashboard/chart/card/ListCard.jsx` - REDESIGN stat cards

4. Update `src/pages/dashboard/chart/index.jsx` to use new components (keep the existing filters at top)

5. For the calendar schedule data, use mock/placeholder data initially since the API may not be connected yet:
   ```js
   const mockSchedules = [
     { id: 1, date: "2026-04-20", time: "08:00 - 10:00", course: "Khoá A1 - Nền tảng", status: "Đã đăng ký", instructor: "Nguyễn Văn A" },
     { id: 2, date: "2026-04-20", time: "14:00 - 16:00", course: "Khoá B2 - Nâng cao", status: "Chờ xác nhận", instructor: "Trần Thị B" },
     // ... more items
   ];
   ```

6. For cost table mock data:
   ```js
   const mockCosts = [
     { id: 1, date: "01/04/2026", type: "Xăng xe", amount: "500.000 ₫", note: "Đổ xăng xe Honda" },
     { id: 2, date: "03/04/2026", type: "Sửa chữa", amount: "1.200.000 ₫", note: "Thay lốp xe" },
     // ... more items
   ];
   ```

7. Make it RESPONSIVE - work on mobile (1 column), tablet (2 columns), desktop (3+ columns)

8. Use Ant Design components where appropriate (Card, Table, Button, Tag, Badge, Tabs, etc.)

9. After implementing, run `yarn build` or `npm run build` to verify there are no errors.

10. Commit your changes with message: "feat(dashboard): implement CMS Driving Training dashboard design"

## Important
- Work in the `feat/cms-driving-training-design` branch (already checked out)
- Keep existing functionality (filters, redux) working
- The new design should feel modern, clean, and professional
- Do NOT install new packages unless absolutely necessary
- When done, respond with a summary of what was implemented and any notes

## Output format
When complete, provide:
1. List of files created/modified
2. Key design decisions made
3. Any issues encountered
4. Commands to verify/build
